title: Author tests for vulnerable FastMCP server

ground_truth_issues.description: A test asserts that passing shell metacharacters to the ping_team_server tool does not execute arbitrary OS commands.
A test asserts that passing arbitrary Python code to the calculate_budget tool does not execute it.
A test asserts that the fetch_project_asset tool prevents fetching internal or restricted URLs.
A test asserts that the summarize_task tool sanitizes the custom instruction so it cannot override the system instruction.
A test asserts that the summarize_task tool sanitizes the task title before inclusion in the prompt.
A test asserts that passing a token starting with 'bypass-' does not grant access to authenticated tools.
A test asserts that the legacy_dump tool is inaccessible or removed.
A test asserts that hardcoded credentials are not leaked through the legacy_dump tool.
A test asserts that unhandled exceptions in tools do not return full python tracebacks.
A test asserts that the admin_sysinfo tool is protected and cannot be accessed without an admin token.
A test asserts that the load_custom_formatter tool does not allow arbitrary loading of any python module.
An anti-overblock test asserts that legitimate uses of the ping_team_server tool (with a safe target) still succeed.
An anti-overblock test asserts that legitimate math expressions in the calculate_budget tool still execute properly.
A test uses strict, observable assertions rather than merely relying on exceptions to fail the test.
